name: Crawfish Etouffee Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pan over medium-low heat.
2. Gradually blend flour into the melted butter, stirring constantly until the mixture forms a dark brown roux, about 10-15 minutes.
3. Add chopped onions, celery, and bell pepper to the roux. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the vegetables are crisp.
4. Stir in minced garlic, cooked crawfish tails, chicken broth, parsley, salt, black and red pepper, and Tabasco. Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes.
5. Serve the etouffee over cooked rice.
